title: Backend: Admin Module Scaffolding
description: Create the backend admin module under modules/admin/ following the module system conventions (index.ts, controllers/, services/, repositories/, types/). Wire up routes at /admin prefix. Register module in waves.config.json. Create database schemas for collections, questions, sections, forms, formulas, translations.

statusHistory.comment: Scaffolding implemented: module structure, domain types, in-memory repositories, CRUD services, REST controllers, and full test suite (151 tests passing)
Branch TASK-2-admin-module-scaffolding created, committed, and pushed. Scaffolding implementation complete with 151 passing tests. Ready for human review.
